The '''''Kiltirin''-class dungeon ship''' was a [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that was a scaled-down version of the [[Lictor-class dungeon ship|''Lictor''-class dungeon ship]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Kiltirin''-class measured 150 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length and could carry up to 1,250 [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]]. It was armed with five quad [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries and a single [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projector.

==History==
[[Vanquisher (Kiltirin-class)|''Vanquisher'']] was a modified ''Kiltirin''-class [[Prison ship/Legends|dungeon ship]] used as [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] ship by the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]].
